## Use case

What are you building and why does Chi need this?

## Proposed API

How should the component look from the user's side? Paste a rough QML example:

```qml
import Chi

MyNewComponent {
    property: "example"
}
```

## Alternatives

What are you doing instead while this doesn't exist?

## Reference

Link to Material 3 spec or other reference design.
